vendor: Make (formerly Integromat)
last-verified: 2026-05-03
type: Visual workflow automation platform

# Make — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | — | Not a data source; can connect to Apollo, Prospeo etc. via modules |
| [[email-verification]] | — | Via connected modules |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | AI modules for email generation; text processing for dynamic content; parallel branch routing |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | Visual scenario builder; delays, filters, routers; connects to Gmail, Outlook, Instantly etc.; A/B via parallel branches |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | △ | Can build aggregation and routing via trigger modules and webhooks |

## Vendor Type
Visual no-code automation. More accessible than n8n for non-technical users; similar capability ceiling.

## Best For
Non-technical teams who want workflow automation without coding, and are comfortable building scenarios in a drag-and-drop interface.

## Limitations
- No built-in warm-up, inbox, or verification
- Execution limits on lower plans (operations per month)
- Less powerful than n8n for complex logic
- Requires connecting to external tools for every capability
